offers.name: Technical SEO
offers.description: Technical SEO removes the crawl, indexing and speed issues that silently cap your rankings — fix the foundation and every other SEO effort works harder. We audit your site with Screaming Frog and Google Search Console, then repair broken redirects, duplicate content, thin pages, crawl budget waste and Core Web Vitals failures. You get a prioritized fix list, schema markup implementation and clean XML sitemaps, with every change documented so your developers can verify it.
offers.priceNote: In SEO retainers from ₹15,000/mo; most fixes live in 2–4 weeks

offers.name: Local SEO
offers.description: Local SEO gets your business competing for Google's map pack when customers in Noida and Delhi NCR search 'near me' — the highest-intent traffic a local business can get. We optimize your Google Business Profile, build consistent NAP citations, earn local reviews and create location pages targeted to the areas you serve. Monthly reporting shows map-pack positions, calls and direction requests, so you see exactly which searches bring customers through the door.
offers.priceNote: In retainers from ₹15,000/mo; expect 90 days for local traction

offers.name: E-commerce SEO
offers.description: E-commerce SEO grows organic revenue by getting your category and product pages in front of the searches shoppers across India actually type. We fix faceted navigation and duplicate-content traps, write keyword-mapped category copy, add Product schema for rich results, and clean up out-of-stock and pagination handling on Shopify or WooCommerce. Reporting ties organic sessions to revenue in GA4, so you know which pages sell — not just which ones rank.
offers.priceNote: Retainers from ₹15,000/mo scale with catalog size; market ₹20k–₹50k

offers.name: Answer Engine Optimization (AEO)
offers.description: Answer Engine Optimization structures your content so ChatGPT, Perplexity and Claude can cite your business when buyers ask for recommendations. We rewrite key pages answer-first, add FAQ and HowTo schema, build entity-consistent About and service pages, and track how often AI assistants mention you versus competitors. As more buying research moves into AI chat, AEO protects the demand your traditional SEO already earns — without waiting for a click that may never come.
offers.priceNote: Bundled into SEO retainers from ₹15,000/mo — no separate fee

offers.name: Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)
offers.description: Generative Engine Optimization prepares your site to be cited in Google AI Overviews and Gemini answers, where a growing share of searches now end without a single click. We optimize the passages AI models quote: concise definitions, statistics with sources, comparison tables and structured data generative engines can lift verbatim. You get a page-by-page GEO scorecard and quarterly visibility tracking across AI Overviews, so you can see where your content appears — and where competitors show up instead.
offers.priceNote: Included in retainers from ₹15,000/mo; baseline report in week 1

offers.name: Google Business Profile Optimization
offers.description: Google Business Profile optimization turns your free GBP listing into a steady source of calls, WhatsApp messages and direction requests. For businesses in Noida and across Delhi NCR, the map pack is often the first — and only — result customers see. We fix categories and attributes, write keyword-rich service descriptions, publish weekly posts and photos, set up review replies and Q&A, and monitor GBP Insights monthly so you know exactly what the listing is producing.
offers.priceNote: Part of local SEO retainers from ₹15,000/mo; setup done in week 1

offers.name: Content Strategy
offers.description: Content strategy maps every page and post to a search your buyers actually make, so you publish for demand instead of guessing. We build a keyword-clustered content calendar from Search Console, Ahrefs and competitor-gap data, define funnel stages for each topic, and brief writers with target queries, entities and internal links. The output is a 90-day roadmap your team — or ours — can execute, with rankings and conversions reviewed monthly.
offers.priceNote: Within retainers from ₹15,000/mo; first roadmap in 2 weeks

offers.name: SEO Audits
offers.description: Our SEO audit tells you exactly why your site isn't ranking — free, 15 pages, delivered within 48 hours. It covers technical health, on-page gaps, backlink profile, local visibility and AI-search readiness, each finding graded by impact and effort so you know what to fix first. Businesses across India use it as a second opinion on their current agency or as the starting brief for a retainer. No sales call required to get it.
offers.priceNote: Free; paid deep-dives fold into retainers from ₹15,000/mo

offers.name: Google Ads
offers.description: DigiSutra manages Google Ads campaigns end to end — Search, Performance Max and Shopping — built around cost per lead, not vanity clicks. As a Google Ads agency in Noida serving startups and SMBs in 12 countries, we handle keyword research, negative-keyword pruning, ad copy testing and bid strategy, with conversion tracking wired before a rupee is spent. Weekly optimization reports show exactly what your budget bought. Start with a free 15-page audit delivered in 48 hours.

offers.priceNote: Management from ₹15,000/mo; campaigns live within 1–2 weeks

offers.description: Our Meta Ads management turns Facebook and Instagram budgets into tracked leads and sales through full-funnel campaigns — awareness, retargeting and conversion. Startups and D2C brands across India use us to stop guessing which creatives work. Every plan includes reporting that ties spend to revenue, and the free 15-page audit shows what to fix first.

offers.name: Landing Page Optimization
offers.description: Landing page optimization makes the clicks you already pay for convert more often — usually the cheapest way to cut cost per lead. offers.name: Store Migrations
offers.description: Store migration without losing SEO or order history — that is the whole job. We move you between Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento, or custom platforms with a full URL mapping and 301 redirect plan, product and customer data transfer, and order history intact. URL structures and metadata are preserved to minimize ranking risk, checkout is re-tested end to end, and the switch happens in a planned cutover window so you keep taking orders throughout.
offers.priceNote: Scoped from ₹60,000 depending on catalog size; 2–6 weeks

offers.name: Updates & Backups
offers.description: Scheduled core, plugin and theme updates plus daily off-site backups keep your website secure, compatible and recoverable — the foundation of any website maintenance plan. DigiSutra applies updates on a staging copy first, verifies nothing breaks, then pushes live and confirms a clean backup restore point. Businesses across India lose sites to one skipped update; a disciplined patch-and-backup routine costs less than a single rebuild. Every cycle is logged, and restores are tested monthly so a rollback takes minutes, not days.
features: Staging tests before every live push
offers.priceNote: Included in care plans from ₹8,000/mo; typical AMC ₹10k–₹25k/mo

offers.name: Security Monitoring
offers.description: Round-the-clock website security monitoring catches malware injections, file changes, brute-force logins and blacklist flags before customers or Google see them. DigiSutra combines firewall rules (Cloudflare WAF), daily malware scans and file-integrity checks with human review from our Noida team, so alerts become fixes instead of noise. You get a monthly security report in plain language: what was blocked, what was patched, what needs a decision. It is the difference between finding a hack in hours and finding it in a search result.
offers.priceNote: Part of care plans from ₹8,000/mo; market AMCs run ₹10k–₹25k/mo

offers.name: Malware Cleanup
offers.description: Most hacked websites can usually be cleaned, hardened and cleared of Google's "this site may be hacked" warning within 24–72 hours. DigiSutra's malware removal covers infected file cleanup, backdoor and rogue-admin removal, database inspection, and resubmission through Google Search Console so warnings and blacklist entries are lifted. We then close the hole that let attackers in — outdated plugins, weak logins, missing firewall — and document everything. For businesses across India running on WordPress, this is the fastest route from "site hacked" back to normal.
offers.priceNote: Included in plans from ₹8,000/mo; typical cleanup 24–72 hours

offers.name: Uptime Monitoring
offers.description: One-minute uptime checks with instant alerts mean downtime gets caught — and acted on — in minutes, not when a customer calls. DigiSutra monitors availability, SSL certificate expiry and key user journeys like checkout or contact forms, not just the homepage. When something goes down, the alert reaches a human who starts diagnosis immediately and keeps you informed until resolution. Monthly uptime reports show availability history, incident timelines and what was fixed, giving you a clear record of how reliably your site actually runs.
offers.priceNote: Included in every care plan from ₹8,000/mo

offers.name: Speed Audits
offers.description: Quarterly website speed audits keep Core Web Vitals — LCP, INP and CLS — in the green so slow pages don't quietly bleed leads and conversions. Each audit runs your key pages through PageSpeed Insights and real-user data, then delivers a prioritized fix list: image compression, caching, script cleanup, hosting bottlenecks. Fixes within maintenance scope are applied in the same cycle; bigger rebuilds get a clear estimate first. You see before-and-after scores every quarter, so speed is tracked like a metric, not guessed at.
offers.priceNote: Bundled with care plans from ₹8,000/mo; audits run quarterly

offers.name: Small Changes Retainer
offers.description: A small-changes retainer means routine website edits — text updates, new banners, landing pages, form tweaks, product changes — are handled within 1–2 business days, with no per-task quotes or freelancer hunting. Requests go to a shared tracker, get confirmed with a turnaround, and ship with a note of what changed. It suits SMBs that need a reliable web team on call but not a full-time hire. Larger jobs are flagged before work starts, so the plan never hides surprise invoices.
features: Clear scope — big jobs quoted first
offers.priceNote: Within care plans from ₹8,000/mo (market AMC: ₹10k–₹25k/mo)

offers.name: Content Strategy
offers.description: A content strategy maps every article, page and asset to the keywords your buyers actually search — so you publish for pipeline, not vanity traffic. DigiSutra audits your existing content, mines keyword and competitor data with Ahrefs and Google Search Console, and delivers a prioritized topic roadmap showing intent, funnel stage and target page for each keyword. Startups and SMBs across India use it as the blueprint for every blog post and landing page that follows — starting with our free 15-page audit in 48 hours.
features: Topic roadmap mapped to funnel stages
offers.priceNote: Included in programs from ₹15,000/mo; roadmap ready in 2 weeks

offers.name: SEO Blog Writing
offers.description: SEO blog writing that leads with the answer — articles structured so Google, ChatGPT and AI Overviews can lift your paragraph as the response. Every post DigiSutra ships from its Noida studio is keyword-mapped, matched to search intent and built with clean H2/H3 structure, FAQ schema and internal links. You get research, briefs, human-edited drafts and on-page optimization in one workflow — no thin AI filler, and no ranking promises we can't stand behind.
features: FAQ schema & internal links built in
offers.priceNote: Core of retainers from ₹15,000/mo (market: ₹15k–₹40k/mo)

offers.name: Landing Page Copy
offers.description: Landing page copy engineered for one action — a headline that states the value, proof that removes doubt and a CTA a visitor can't misread. DigiSutra writes conversion copy for ad campaigns, product launches and lead-gen pages: message hierarchy, objection handling, social proof placement and A/B-ready headline variants. Because we also manage paid campaigns, the copy is built to convert the Google and Meta traffic you're already paying for — clicks into leads, not bounces.
features: Full page copy, hero to CTA
offers.priceNote: Included in programs from ₹15,000/mo; copy in about a week

offers.name: Case Studies & Whitepapers
offers.description: Case studies and whitepapers are the proof assets that close B2B deals — evidence a prospect can forward to their boss. DigiSutra runs the full production: customer interviews, data gathering, a challenge–solution–result narrative, design-ready copy and a polished PDF plus web version. Use them in sales decks, email nurture and LinkedIn campaigns; one strong case study outworks ten generic blog posts. We write them for SaaS companies, B2B services and D2C brands alike.
offers.priceNote: Scoped within ₹15k–₹40k/mo programs; 2–3 weeks per asset

offers.name: Content Calendars
offers.description: A content calendar turns publishing from ad hoc into automatic: a dated, owner-assigned schedule covering every blog post, email and social asset for the next 30–90 days. DigiSutra builds yours around your keyword strategy, seasonal demand and campaign dates, delivered in Notion, Google Sheets or your CMS with a brief attached to every slot. The result is a publishing rhythm your team can actually keep — content that compounds instead of stalling after month one.
features: Brief attached to every content slot
Delivered in Notion, Sheets or CMS
offers.priceNote: Included in retainers from ₹15,000/mo; first calendar in week 1

offers.name: Content Refresh & Optimization
offers.description: Refreshing old content is the fastest SEO win most sites ignore — updating a decaying post costs a fraction of writing a new one and targets keywords you already rank for. DigiSutra audits your library with Google Search Console and Ahrefs, flags pages losing clicks, then rewrites intros answer-first, updates stats, adds FAQ schema and repairs internal links. It's how businesses in Noida — and our clients in 12 countries — squeeze more from content they've already paid for.
offers.priceNote: Within programs from ₹15,000/mo; refreshes ship monthly

offers.name: Email Campaigns
offers.description: Professionally managed email marketing campaigns — newsletters, promotions and product announcements planned, written, designed and sent for you every month. As an email marketing agency in Noida serving clients in 12 countries, DigiSutra handles subject-line testing, mobile-friendly templates on Mailchimp, Brevo or Zoho Campaigns, and open-and-click reporting, all built to drive repeat sales from the audience you already own. No renting attention from ad platforms; your list, your channel, your margins. Start with a free 15-page audit delivered in 48 hours.
offers.priceNote: In programs from ₹10,000/mo + platform fees; first send in 1 week

offers.name: SMS Campaigns
offers.description: Bulk SMS marketing that puts time-sensitive offers, reminders and alerts straight into your customers' pockets — messages most people read within minutes. DigiSutra manages the full stack for businesses across India: TRAI DLT registration, sender-ID and template approval, segmented sends via MSG91 or Twilio, and delivery reporting. Ideal for flash sales, appointment reminders and payment nudges where email is too slow. Get a free 15-page marketing audit in 48 hours to see where SMS fits your funnel.
offers.priceNote: In programs from ₹10,000/mo; SMS platform & DLT fees billed at cost

offers.name: WhatsApp Broadcasts
offers.description: WhatsApp broadcast campaigns delivered through the official WhatsApp Business API — the channel Indian customers open first — without the number-ban risk of unofficial bulk senders. We handle Meta business verification, template approval, opt-in list management and scheduled broadcasts for offers, restock alerts and festival promotions, plus read-and-reply reporting after every send. Broadcasts pair naturally with our WhatsApp automation, so replies get answered in seconds. Ask for the free 15-page audit, delivered in 48 hours.
offers.priceNote: In programs from ₹10,000/mo + Meta conversation fees; live in ~1 week

offers.name: Drip & Nurture Sequences
offers.description: Automated drip campaigns and lead-nurture sequences that follow up every lead without anyone lifting a finger — welcome series, abandoned-cart flows, post-purchase journeys and re-engagement emails triggered by what each contact actually does. We map the journey, write every message, build the flows in Mailchimp, Brevo or your CRM, and refine them from real open and conversion data. One build keeps working around the clock, so no lead goes cold because your team got busy. Free 15-page audit in 48 hours.
offers.priceNote: In programs from ₹10,000/mo; first sequences live in 2–3 weeks

offers.name: List Building & Segmentation
offers.description: List building and audience segmentation that grow a clean, permission-based subscriber base — then slice it by behaviour, purchase history and interest so every campaign lands with the people most likely to act. Deliverables include lead magnets and signup forms on your site, WhatsApp and checkout opt-ins, list hygiene to remove dead addresses, and segment structures inside your email or CRM platform. Smaller, sharper segments consistently outperform blast-everyone sends. Request the free 15-page audit — delivered within 48 hours — to see how your list scores.
offers.priceNote: Included in programs from ₹10,000/mo; initial build in 1–2 weeks

offers.name: Deliverability Setup
offers.description: Email deliverability setup is how your campaigns reach the primary inbox instead of spam: SPF, DKIM and DMARC records configured correctly, a dedicated sending domain warmed up gradually, and blacklist and reputation monitoring from day one. It is the unglamorous work most businesses across India skip — and the reason well-written emails go unread. We check your current sending setup as part of the free 15-page audit, delivered in 48 hours, and fix what is silently costing you reach.
offers.priceNote: One-time setup within programs from ₹10,000/mo; done in ~1 week

offers.name: Creator Discovery & Vetting
offers.description: Creator discovery and vetting means finding influencers whose audiences are real, engaged and relevant to your brand — before any money changes hands. We shortlist creators across Instagram, YouTube and regional platforms, then screen engagement rates, audience demographics, follower authenticity and past brand work using audit tools like HypeAuditor. You get a vetted shortlist with rates, reach and fit notes for each creator, so every collaboration starts from data. Fake-follower checks are standard on every shortlist.
offers.priceNote: Included in campaigns from ₹25,000; shortlist ready in 5–7 days

offers.name: Campaign Strategy
offers.description: An influencer campaign strategy sets the goal, creator mix, content briefs, deliverables and posting timeline before anything goes live — so the campaign runs like a project, not a favour. We define target audience, platform split, hashtags, disclosure requirements and per-creator deliverables, then lock it in a written brief every creator signs off on. As an influencer marketing agency in Noida, we plan campaigns for startups and SMBs that need results they can report, not just likes.
offers.priceNote: Campaigns from ₹25,000; strategy locked in week one

offers.name: Micro-Influencer Programs
offers.description: Micro-influencer marketing uses many creators in the 10k–100k follower range instead of one expensive celebrity — typically higher engagement rates, lower cost per post and more authentic reach. We recruit, brief and manage batches of micro and nano influencers in niches from D2C and food to fintech and local services, then consolidate results into one report. Ideal for SMBs that want steady creator content every month without celebrity budgets.
offers.priceNote: Programs from ₹25,000; creator fees vary by tier

offers.name: Content Collaborations
offers.description: Content collaborations pair your brand with creators to co-produce posts, Instagram Reels, YouTube reviews and unboxings that feel native to the creator's feed — not like ads dropped into it. We handle concept, brief, script review and approval loops, so the content stays on-brand while keeping the creator's authentic voice. Each collaboration ships with agreed formats, captions and tagging, and can feed your own social calendar. Popular with D2C and consumer brands in Noida and Delhi NCR.
offers.priceNote: Part of campaigns from ₹25,000; content live in 2–4 weeks

offers.name: Performance Tracking
offers.description: Influencer performance tracking measures reach, engagement, clicks and conversions for every creator in your campaign — so you fund what works and drop what doesn't. We set up UTM links, coupon codes and platform insights per creator, then report cost per engagement and cost per conversion in one dashboard. No vanity-metric decks: you see which creators drove traffic and sales, benchmarked against your paid channels. It's how we run influencer marketing like performance marketing.
features: UTM links & coupon codes per creator
offers.priceNote: Included in campaigns from ₹25,000; wrap report in 7 days

offers.name: UGC Rights Management
offers.description: UGC rights management secures written usage rights so you can legally reuse creator photos, videos and reviews in your own ads, website and email — often the cheapest ad creative you'll ever get. We negotiate usage scope, duration and whitelisting (running Meta ads through the creator's handle) into every collaboration contract, and hand over a rights-cleared content library. For brands across India buying creator content, this is the step that turns one post into months of ad creative.
features: Reuse across ads, web and email
offers.priceNote: Rights included in campaigns from ₹25,000; extended use negotiable

offers.name: Custom AI Chatbots
offers.description: A custom AI chatbot is a purpose-built conversational agent trained on your products, policies and sales flow — not a template widget with your logo on it. DigiSutra designs the conversation, builds on Claude or GPT APIs, connects your CRM and WhatsApp, and tests against real customer queries before launch. Startups and SMBs across India use these bots to qualify leads and answer buyers round the clock. You get full prompt documentation, admin controls and no vendor lock-in.
offers.priceNote: Custom builds from ₹75,000 (market ₹1L–₹4L); live in 3–5 weeks

offers.name: RAG Knowledge Assistants
offers.description: RAG knowledge assistants let AI answer questions from your own documents — manuals, SOPs, product sheets, past tickets — instead of guessing from the open internet. We chunk and index your content in a vector database, wire retrieval into Claude or GPT, and add source citations so every answer is traceable. Ideal for support teams, HR policies and internal wikis. Hallucination testing and an update pipeline for new documents come with every build.
features: Works on PDFs, wikis and tickets
offers.priceNote: From ₹75,000 depending on data volume; typical build 4–6 weeks

offers.name: AI API Integrations
offers.description: AI API integration connects Claude, GPT or Gemini directly into the tools you already run — CRM, helpdesk, spreadsheets, internal portals — so AI works where your team works. Our Noida-based developers handle authentication, rate limits, cost controls and fallbacks, then document everything for your team. Common builds include auto-drafted email replies, ticket summarization and lead scoring inside Zoho or HubSpot. You keep your own API keys and own the code outright.
offers.priceNote: Integrations from ₹75,000; scoped builds ship in 2–4 weeks

offers.name: Process Automation Models
offers.description: Process automation models hand repetitive decisions to AI — invoice categorization, document data extraction, lead routing, approval triage — so your team stops doing work software can do. We map the workflow first, build around Claude or GPT with human review on low-confidence cases, and connect everything to your existing systems via API or n8n. SMBs across India typically automate a first process within a month, then expand. Accuracy is benchmarked before anything touches live data.
features: n8n / API hookups to your systems
offers.priceNote: From ₹75,000 per process (market ₹1L–₹4L); first flow in ~4 weeks

offers.name: AI Dashboards & Insights
offers.description: An AI dashboard turns raw business data into plain-language answers — ask why leads dropped last week and get an explanation, not just a chart. We connect your sales, marketing and operations data, layer Claude on top for summaries and anomaly detection, and deliver a view your team reads in minutes each morning. Weekly AI-written digests and Slack or WhatsApp alerts come standard, so insights reach you without opening a report. No analyst required.
features: Sales, ads and ops data in one view
offers.priceNote: Dashboards from ₹75,000; first version live in 3–4 weeks

offers.name: Fine-tuned Workflows
offers.description: Fine-tuned workflows are prompt chains and pipelines engineered for your specific domain — legal drafting, medical intake, real-estate listings, anything generic AI gets wrong. We test prompts against your real examples, version them, and build evaluation sets so output quality is measured, not assumed. The result is AI that follows your tone, format and compliance rules on the first try. Every workflow ships with documentation your team can maintain and extend without us.
features: Docs your team can maintain solo
offers.priceNote: From ₹75,000; typically 2–3 weeks per workflow

offers.name: 24/7 AI Support Agent
offers.description: A 24/7 AI support agent answers customer questions instantly — at 2 AM, on weekends, during festival rushes — so routine queries stop piling up in your inbox. DigiSutra builds always-on support bots for startups and SMBs across India, trained on your actual FAQs, policies and product data, with escalation rules for anything the bot shouldn't touch. You get a deployed web chat agent, response-quality testing before launch, and monthly tuning based on real conversations. No scripts to write, no seats to hire.
features: Always-on web chat agent, live in weeks
Trained on your FAQs and policies
offers.priceNote: Core of AI support setups from ₹40,000; live in 2–3 weeks.

offers.name: Website + WhatsApp Coverage
offers.description: One AI support agent covering both website chat and WhatsApp Business gives customers the same accurate answer on whichever channel they prefer. We deploy a single knowledge brain across both — WhatsApp Business API setup, approved message templates, and a matching web widget — so you maintain answers once, not twice. For Indian buyers who live on WhatsApp, this is usually the highest-traffic support channel from day one. Conversation logs from both channels feed one dashboard for review.
features: One knowledge base for both channels
offers.priceNote: Both channels covered in setups from ₹40,000; 2–4 weeks.

offers.name: Human Handoff Design
offers.description: Good human handoff design means the AI knows when to stop: frustrated customers, complex complaints and high-value buying signals get routed to your team with the full conversation attached, so nobody repeats themselves. We define escalation triggers, working-hours routing and fallback replies, then test them against real query samples before launch. Triggers are tuned monthly as transcripts reveal what the bot should attempt — and what it should hand over.
offers.priceNote: Included in support-bot setups from ₹40,000; no separate fee.

offers.name: Knowledge Base Training
offers.description: Knowledge base training grounds your AI support agent in your own documents — help articles, policies, price lists, product specs — so it answers from facts you control instead of the open internet. We structure your content for retrieval (RAG), fill the gaps a bot exposes fast, and set the agent to say "I don't know" rather than invent. Updates are ongoing: change a policy, and the bot's answers change with it. Accuracy is reviewed against real transcripts each month.
features: Answers grounded in your content only
offers.priceNote: Part of setups from ₹40,000; initial training in 1–2 weeks.

offers.name: Multilingual Replies
offers.description: Multilingual replies let one AI support agent handle Hindi, English, Hinglish and regional-language queries without separate bots or translated scripts. The agent detects the customer's language and answers in it, pulling from a single knowledge base — so serving customers across India doesn't multiply your maintenance work. We test tone and accuracy per language before launch, because a stiff machine-translated reply reads worse than no reply. Useful for D2C brands, clinics and service businesses with mixed-language audiences.
offers.priceNote: Included in setups from ₹40,000; extra languages add days, not lakhs.

offers.name: Support Analytics
offers.description: Support analytics tell you what customers actually ask, what the AI resolves on its own, and which questions stump it — data most SMBs never had before a bot. You get a monthly report covering top query themes, resolution and handoff rates, and gaps to fix in your knowledge base; recurring complaints often point straight at product or pricing-page fixes. For DigiSutra clients in Noida and worldwide, this report doubles as free voice-of-customer research. It ships with every support-bot setup.
offers.priceNote: Bundled with every setup from ₹40,000; first report after month one.
